atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind v4: defines theme tokens inline in CSS.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind v4: defines a custom variant (e.g. dark mode selector).

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Tailwind: applies utility classes inside a CSS rule.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Tailwind: registers styles in a named cascade layer.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind v4: applies a variant inside a CSS rule.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind v4: defines a custom utility class.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind v4: specifies a source path for content scanning.

atDirectives.name: @reference
atDirectives.description: Tailwind v4: imports another CSS file as a reference for @apply without emitting its styles.
